Tests if `Number.MIN_VALUE` is equal to `5e-324`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks if the constant `Number.MIN_VALUE` is equal to `5e-324`. `Number.MIN_VALUE` represents the smallest positive numeric value that can be represented in JavaScript. The assertion ensures that the JavaScript environment correctly defines this constant according to the ECMAScript specification. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on validating a specific aspect of the JavaScript `Number` object.
